meta.name: bicep-code-best-practices
meta.title: Bicep Code Best Practices Skill
meta.description: Infrastructure as Code with Bicep Triggers on: **/*.bicep

original_definition.skill_description: Infrastructure as Code with Bicep Triggers on: **/*.bicep

actions.name: Use latest stable API versions for all resources
actions.description: Use latest stable API versions for all resources

actions.description: Set default values that are safe for test environments (use low-cost pricing tiers)

actions.description: Use parameters for settings that change between deployments

actions.description: Create resource dependencies through symbolic names (resourceA.id) not explicit dependsOn

actions.description: Use template expressions with uniqueString() to create meaningful and unique resource names

actions.description: Include helpful // comments within your Bicep files to improve readability

rules.description: Always declare parameters at the top of files with @description decorators

directives.description: When writing Bicep code, use lowerCamelCase for all names (variables, parameters, resources)
directives.name: When writing Bicep code, use lowerCamelCase...

directives.description: Use resource type descriptive symbolic names (e.g., 'storageAccount' not 'storageAccountName')

directives.description: Avoid using 'name' in a symbolic name as it represents the resource, not the resource's name

directives.description: Avoid distinguishing variables and parameters by the use of suffixes
directives.name: Avoid distinguishing variables and parameters by...

directives.description: Use descriptive @description decorators for all parameters
directives.name: Use descriptive @description decorators for all...

directives.name: Specify minimum and maximum character length...

directives.description: Use variables to contain complex expressions instead of embedding them directly in resource properties
